_comment: 金曜『臨床を変えた古典』枠。麻酔7:集中治療3。★=疫学/観察研究。OA: ○全文公開 △非OA(引用最小限・図表転載なし)。statKey は記事の統計テーマで、連続回避に使用。

classics.title: Effects of extended-release metoprolol succinate in patients undergoing non-cardiac surgery (POISE)
classics.note: 複合EPの罠：心筋梗塞は減るが死亡・脳卒中は増加

classics.title: Aspirin in patients undergoing noncardiac surgery (POISE-2)
classics.note: 2x2要因デザイン。周術期アスピリンは心血管イベント減らさず出血増加

classics.title: Restrictive versus liberal fluid therapy for major abdominal surgery (RELIEF)
classics.note: 制限輸液が腎障害増加。ITT/per-protocol議論に好適

classics.title: Nitrous oxide and long-term morbidity and mortality in the ENIGMA trial
classics.topic: 亜酸化窒素と長期予後
classics.note: RCTの長期追跡。観察的フォローアップと生存解析

classics.title: Post-anaesthesia pulmonary complications after neuromuscular blockade (POPULAR)
classics.topic: 筋弛緩と術後肺合併症
classics.note: 大規模前向きコホート(約2.2万例)。観察研究の交絡調整

classics.title: Bispectral index monitoring to prevent awareness during anaesthesia (B-Aware)
classics.note: 相対リスク減少82%の解釈。稀なアウトカムと絶対差

classics.title: Residual neuromuscular block prevalence (RECITE)
classics.note: 前向き観察。有病率・割合の信頼区間

classics.title: Intensive versus conventional glucose control in critically ill patients
classics.note: 公開済み(サンプル記事)

classics.title: Ventilation with lower tidal volumes for ARDS
classics.note: 肺保護換気の確立。早期中止

classics.title: Prone positioning in severe ARDS (PROSEVA)
classics.note: 腹臥位で死亡率低下。Kaplan-Meier解説に好適
